diffs.diff:
--- a/predict.py
+++ b/predict.py
@@ -58,11 +58,14 @@
             height = row.get('image_height', 1080)

             image_id = row['id']

             image = Image.open(image_path).convert('RGB')

-            messages = [{'role': 'user', 'content': [{'type': 'image'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': f'{instruction}\nOutput as <box>x1 y1 x2 y2</box> or <point>x y</point>.'}]}]

+            messages = [

+                {'role': 'system', 'content': 'You are a helpful assistant that precisely locates UI elements in desktop software screenshots using the exact output format requested.'},

+                {'role': 'user', 'content': [{'type': 'image'}, {'type': 'text', 'text': f'{instruction}\nOutput the bounding box or point as <box>x1 y1 x2 y2</box> or <point>x y</point>.'}]}

+            ]

             text = processor.apply_chat_template(messages, tokenize=False, add_generation_prompt=True)

             inputs = processor(text=[text], images=[image], padding=True, return_tensors='pt', min_pixels=256*28*28, max_pixels=512*28*28).to(model.device)

             with torch.no_grad():

-                generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=64, eos_token_id=processor.tokenizer.eos_token_id, do_sample=False, pad_token_id=processor.tokenizer.pad_token_id)

+                generated_ids = model.generate(**inputs, max_new_tokens=128, eos_token_id=processor.tokenizer.eos_token_id, do_sample=False, pad_token_id=processor.tokenizer.pad_token_id)

                 input_len = inputs['input_ids'].shape[1]

                 generated_ids = generated_ids[:, input_len:]

                 generated_text = processor.batch_decode(generated_ids, skip_special_tokens=False)[0]

             for i, line in enumerate(f):

-                if i >= max_samples: break

+                if max_samples is not None and i >= max_samples: break

                 self.data.append(json.loads(line.strip()))

         print(f'Loaded {len(self.data)} samples for training')

     def __len__(self):

 model.print_trainable_parameters()

+optimizer = AdamW(model.parameters(), lr=5e-5)

     json.dump({'grid_size': grid_size}, f)

     instruction = item.get('instruction', 'Locate the UI element.')
